spec_match.rationale: Demo invokes the relevant API surface (Corner shaping (corner-shape, superellipse, squircle)) and surfaces the result in the page, demonstrating the spec behaviour the feature ships.

interactive.rationale: Real interactive controls drive the page (14 buttons, 5 inputs, 4 selects, 7 ranges, 0 listeners) — well past the static-card bar.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Concept page lede restates and delivers on the framing used in the feature index card.

edge_cases.rationale: Only the happy path is demonstrated — no visible error / unsupported / boundary handling for the user to explore.

references.rationale: Page cites https://chromestatus.com/feature/5357329815699456 in the see also reference list.

design_system.rationale: Mostly follows the design system but 7 raw hex colours found in inline styles where CSS variables are expected.

openQuestions.title: Demonstrate failure and edge-case branches
openQuestions.detail: Add visible branches for the unsupported / unavailable / error / boundary inputs paths. For built-in AI APIs, that means 'downloadable', 'downloading', 'unavailable' availability states; for HTTP features, error responses and CSP blocks; for CSS features, zero / extreme / inherited values. Today only the happy path is reachable from the UI.

openQuestions.title: Move inline hex colours to CSS variables
openQuestions.detail: Replace raw hex values in the inline <style> block with the shared design tokens (--bg-ivory, --bg-paper, --bg-stone, --text-black, --text-charcoal, --text-muted, --border-black, --accent-blue, --accent-emerald, --accent-rose). Confirm any text-on-background combination still passes WCAG AA (4.5:1 normal / 3:1 large). If you override a button background, also override color (CLAUDE.md rule 6).

summary: After adding the ChromeStatus reference, 'Per-Corner Mixer' still has an edge-case coverage failure and a minor design-token cleanup, but the major reference blocker is resolved.
